    @allure.title("DELETE /api/v1/announcement/{id}/ - non-author returns 403")
    @allure.severity(allure.severity_level.CRITICAL)
    def test_delete_non_author_returns_403(self, auth_headers):
        with allure.step("Find announcement not owned by auth user"):
            list_url = f"{BASE_URL}/api/v1/announcement/"
            resp = requests.get(list_url)
            assert resp.status_code == 200
            own_resp = requests.get(
                f"{BASE_URL}/api/v1/account/seller/announcement/own/",
                headers=auth_headers
            )
            own_ids = {a["id"] for a in own_resp.json().get("results", [])}
            other = next(
                (a for a in resp.json().get("results", []) if a["id"] not in own_ids), None
            )
            if other is None:
                pytest.skip("No other user's announcement found")
    
        with allure.step(f"Send DELETE to id={other['id']} (not owned)"):
            response = requests.delete(url(other["id"]), headers=auth_headers)
    
        with allure.step("Verify status code is 403"):
>           assert response.status_code == 403, \
                f"Expected: 403, Got: {response.status_code} | {response.text}"
E           AssertionError: Expected: 403, Got: 404 | 
E           assert 404 == 403
E            +  where 404 = <Response [404]>.status_code
